basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 15 July 2026 at the ACTREC office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. (Pathology) OR equivalent postgraduate degree in Pathology recognized by National Medical Commission.
qualification.details: Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology): M.D. (Pathology) OR equivalent postgraduate degree in Pathology recognized by National Medical Commission. Minimum 3 years' post M.D. / D.N.B. experience in Pathology in a Teaching Hospital.

salary_details.details: Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology): Rs. 1,40,000/- to Rs. 1,52,000/- p.m. (depending upon work experience)

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.advanced_centre_for_treatment_research_a: M.D. (Pathology) OR equivalent postgraduate degree in Pathology recognized by National Medical Commission.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ACTREC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology): M.D. (Pathology) OR equivalent postgraduate degree in Pathology recognized by National Medical Commission. Minimum 3 years' post M.D. / D.N.B. experience in Pathology in a Teaching Hospital.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology): Rs. 1,40,000/- to Rs. 1,52,000/- p.m. (depending upon work experience)

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the ACTREC recruitment is Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology).

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for this post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is M.D. (Pathology) or an equivalent postgraduate degree in Pathology recognized by the National Medical Commission.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years' post M.D. / D.N.B. experience in Pathology in a Teaching Hospital is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The age limit is up to 45 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Ad-hoc Consultant (Pathology) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1,40,000/- to Rs. 1,52,000/- per month, depending on work experience.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their Bio-data, recent passport size photograph, Xerox copies of Aadhar Card, Pan Card, Educational qualification certificates, and Working experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at the ACTREC office in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra.
